Attempt to parse a character vector of timestamps

Source: R/21_longitudinal.R
dot-parse_timestamps.Rd

Tries multiple common datetime formats via as.POSIXct() and returns the first format that successfully parses the majority of non-NA values. Falls back to NA for entries that cannot be parsed.

Usage

.parse_timestamps(x)

Arguments

x

Character vector of timestamp strings

Value

POSIXct vector (NA where parsing failed)
